# BeaconWeb
> Digital growth agency offering free audits and building/managing websites, SEO, social media, and paid ads for local service businesses in the Coachella Valley.

BeaconWeb starts every client relationship with a free audit — no charge, no pitch. The audit reviews a business's website, Google presence, social media, and paid ads, then delivers a plain-English breakdown of what's working and what isn't. If it makes sense, BeaconWeb goes on to build and manage the fix.

## Owner
- Tristan Trigg
- Email: tristantrigg@beaconweb.co
- Phone: (541) 291-7030
- Location: La Quinta, CA — Coachella Valley

## The Free Audit
The entry point for every client. Covers six areas:
1. Website Speed + Mobile — load time and mobile experience
2. Google Business Profile — completeness and local search readiness
3. Local SEO + Rankings — where the business actually ranks locally
4. Social Media Presence — activity and consistency across platforms
5. Lead Follow-Up System — what happens after someone reaches out
6. Paid Ads Performance — whether ad spend is converting

## The Process
1. Business fills out the free audit inquiry form
2. BeaconWeb sends an onboarding form
3. Strategy call gets scheduled automatically
4. Client receives the audit findings + a proposal (pricing is discussed here, not on the website)
5. BeaconWeb builds and manages what's needed — website, SEO, social, ads

## Services (scoped per client after the audit — pricing is customized after your free audit, no fixed packages)
- Website design and development (custom-coded, mobile-first)
- SEO and content
- Social media ads
- Google and Meta paid ads
- Video and photo creative
- Lead follow-up automation

Most engagements include ongoing monthly management, not just a one-time build.

## Target Clients
Local service businesses in the Coachella Valley (Indio, La Quinta, Palm Desert, Palm Springs, Cathedral City, Rancho Mirage, Coachella, Indian Wells, and surrounding areas) that depend on being found locally and following up with leads quickly.

## Credibility
- 3 years building websites for Coachella Valley businesses
- Client testimonials (verified, no names published): "Tristan is a pro, set up my website with online store in a few days, excellent response time and very advanced with online development." / "Tristan is the man he helped me grow my business to unthinkable numbers." / "Tristan made me a website and it came really good. Only took him 2 weeks and instantly saw results."

## Real Work
- Indio Car Wash — new custom-coded website, live in 6 days
- K&R Car Wash — membership system, digital punch card, gift certificates
- Overcast Industriez — client dashboard, landing pages, QR code tracking

## Technology
- HTML/CSS/JS (custom-coded website, no framework)
- GoHighLevel (CRM, onboarding, scheduling, automation)
- Netlify (hosting)
- GitHub (version control)
